title: Mandate Health Metrics 2026
methodology: Mandate health scores and failure mode recovery rates are derived from Majhi OS direct engagement data through June 2026. Industry baselines reference published recruiting research. Detection thresholds are calibrated to trigger in the recovery window, not after it closes.
license: CC BY 4.0 — Attribution required: cite as Majhi OS Mandate Health Metrics 2026

hiring_health_score.description: The Hiring Health Score is a real-time composite operational score for every active executive search mandate. It moves before a mandate stalls.

components.name: outreach_response_rate
components.label: Outreach Response Rate
components.description: Reply rate on active candidate outreach

components.name: pipeline_velocity
components.label: Pipeline Velocity
components.description: Days between stage transitions in the candidate pipeline

components.name: shortlist_approval_rate
components.label: Shortlist Approval Rate
components.description: Hiring manager approval rate on submitted candidates

components.name: recruiter_load_index
components.label: Recruiter Load Index
components.description: Active mandates vs. recruiter bandwidth threshold

components.name: hiring_manager_engagement
components.label: Hiring Manager Engagement
components.description: Response time and feedback quality from hiring managers

components.name: audit_trail_completeness
components.label: Audit Trail Completeness
components.description: Percentage of mandate-level actions captured and attributed

failure_modes.name: outreach_decay
failure_modes.label: Outreach Decay
failure_modes.description: Reply rates drop progressively as candidates are over-messaged or targeting is misaligned. Detectable via outreach response rate component.

failure_modes.name: shortlist_rejection_loop
failure_modes.label: Shortlist Rejection Loop
failure_modes.description: Hiring manager repeatedly rejects shortlisted candidates without updated criteria. Root cause is shallow intake. Detectable via shortlist approval rate trend.

failure_modes.name: recruiter_overload
failure_modes.label: Recruiter Overload
failure_modes.description: Recruiter carrying too many active mandates for the role complexity. Highest recovery rate of all failure modes when caught early. Detectable via recruiter load index.

failure_modes.name: hiring_manager_disengagement
failure_modes.label: Hiring Manager Disengagement
failure_modes.description: Hiring manager stops providing feedback or goes dark on submissions. Detectable via hiring manager engagement component of health score.

failure_modes.name: pipeline_collapse
failure_modes.label: Pipeline Collapse
failure_modes.description: Candidates stop progressing between stages without clear rejection. Lowest recovery rate — typically requires full pipeline restart. Detectable via pipeline velocity component.

failure_modes.name: scope_drift
failure_modes.label: Scope Drift
failure_modes.description: Role requirements shift without updating the mandate brief or candidate criteria. High recovery when caught early. Detectable via brief version comparison.

audit_coverage.description: Industry baseline is under 15%. 9% coverage means 91% of recruiting activity leaves no recoverable record when a mandate fails. 100% coverage means every action is automatically captured and attributed.
audit_coverage.source: Majhi OS operational data + industry research
